title: Review: project-LICHEN Zephyr C 2026-06-27
notes:
## Review Confidence

Review confidence: 15% chance of missed bug.

Least confident areas:
- Link layer integration (lichen_link_tx/rx) - only reviewed call sites, not internals
- SCHC compression edge cases - round-trip tests exist but fuzz coverage unknown
- Renode/sim driver timing - polling loops not validated on real hardware

Would raise confidence if:
- lichen/subsys/lichen/link/*.c reviewed (link layer implementation)
- Fuzz testing on SCHC compress/decompress
- Hardware-in-loop testing for LoRa drivers

Total: 54 findings
close_reason: All 44 findings addressed: 5 P0 bugs fixed, 28 P1 issues fixed, 2 P2 closed as intentional design, 9 P3 closed as good patterns
